subject: [CASSANDRA] The current AAI on oom is using a very old and vulnerable version of cassandra DB 3.11.4. We need to update it to a newer version like 3.11.13
commit_message:
[CASSANDRA] The current AAI on oom is using a very
old and vulnerable version of cassandra DB 3.11.4.
We need to update it to a newer version like 3.11.13

Signed-off-by: Sharath Prakash <sharathp@aarnanetworks.com>
Issue-ID: OOM-2993
Change-Id: Iecbd1748ba899a7d435c9ece61e123511b64ec76

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Seems, that the cassandra doesn't come up

Patch Set 1:

Yes Andreas, I called for redeploy because the result was overwrited by another change. We will get more logs to check what happended

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Cassandra is not starting

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

We need new charts. The ones for 3.11.4 are from 2019. The 3.11.13 requires almost latest charts. We maintain charts in oom, but they are based on bitnami ones. Now we need to upgrade to the latest from bitnami and it is not simple now. We should rather move cassandra helm chart outside oom and we should customize its deployment for ONAP needs.

Abandoned

Needs bigger updates than only image version
